name: Chicken Kona (Crockpot)
recipeIngredient: 3 to 4 pounds chicken, in large pieces or quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
2. Place the seasoned chicken in the Crockpot.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the chopped green onions, soy sauce, white wine, and water.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken in the Crockpot.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 3-4 hours or until the chicken is tender.
6. Remove the chicken from the Crockpot and place it on a broiler pan.
7. Brush the chicken with honey.
8. Broil the chicken until it is golden brown, brushing with additional honey several times.
The chicken and sauce may be refrigerated and broiled at a later time if desired.
